creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 204465
svn diff to upgrade to 0.55.5

gohugo has been updated to 0.55.6
(https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.55.6)

The attached svn diff brings this port up from 0.55.5 to 0.55.6

Change log:
 - Fixes infrequent pagination crashes

Build successfully against amd64/i386 11.2-RELEASE, 11.2-STABLE, 12.0-RELEASE, 12.0-STABLE, and 13.0-CURRENT.

Poudriere logs available here for a limited time:
https://logs.bnix.club/gohugo-0.55.6_2019-05-18/

portlint -AC:
looks fine.
